title: claude_credentials::refresh_and_load parses response field-by-field; silent refresh-token reuse
description:
## Severity
Minor
## Dimension
error-handling
## Location
src/claude_credentials.rs:253-271 (refresh_and_load)
## Violation
The refresh response is read field-by-field via Value indexing. `refresh_response[\"access_token\"].as_str().ok_or(\"No access_token in refresh response\")?` elides the upstream's actual content. `refresh_response[\"expires_in\"].as_i64()` returns None for `expires_in` returned as a STRING. The `unwrap_or(refresh_token)` (line 260) silently re-uses the OLD refresh token if the response field is absent — if Anthropic rotates refresh tokens, missing the new value here surfaces as 401-loops days later with no log trail.
## Mandated refactor
Parse the entire response into a typed RefreshResponse struct via serde_json::from_value. Accept expires_in as i64 or string via custom deserializer. Make refresh_token rotation explicit: log when rotated vs reused. Surface upstream body via redact_oauth_error_body on field-missing errors.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
